images.description: Bronze statue of Lord Shiva as Nataraja against rustic wall
Khajuraho temple architecture with clear blue sky

instructions_to_main_agent.stack: Pure HTML, CSS, JS and Bootstrap 5 (No React, No Tailwind). Use index.html, about.html, videos.html, blog.html, post.html, contact.html. Put custom CSS in a style.css file and custom JS in script.js.
instructions_to_main_agent.framework_integration: Include Bootstrap 5 CSS/JS via CDN. Include FontAwesome via CDN for icons. Import the specified Google Fonts in your CSS.
instructions_to_main_agent.global_styles: Set the body background to the Secondary color (#FAF9F6) and text to the text_main color. Use custom CSS to override standard Bootstrap primary colors to Deep Saffron (#D35400) and link colors to Accent (#1A237E).
instructions_to_main_agent.typography: Apply 'Cormorant Garamond' to all headings (h1-h6) and 'Lato' to body text. Ensure headings have a tighter line-height.
instructions_to_main_agent.navigation: Use Bootstrap Navbar component. Make it sticky using '.sticky-top'. Use 'ॐ Shaivam' as the text logo styled elegantly with the heading font. Style the active link with an underline or the primary saffron color.
instructions_to_main_agent.hero_section: For the hero on index.html, use the Nataraja image as a background. Apply a dark gradient overlay (e.g., 'rgba(33, 33, 33, 0.8) to rgba(33, 33, 33, 0.4)') to guarantee readability of the Ivory/White heading and text layered on top. Use Bootstrap's container and text-center utility.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: For cards (Core concepts, Blogs), use Bootstrap's '.card' but remove default borders ('border-0'). Add a custom soft shadow class and on hover, slightly elevate them ('transform: translateY(-5px);') with an enhanced shadow. Add FontAwesome icons to feature cards.
instructions_to_main_agent.video_gallery: On videos.html, use Bootstrap's Nav tabs for categories and standard grid for video placeholder cards. You can use an iframe for placeholders or an image with a 'play' icon overlay.
instructions_to_main_agent.forms_and_accordions: On contact.html, use Bootstrap Forms for the contact inputs. Add a simple JS function to show a success message on submit. Use Bootstrap Accordion for FAQs.
instructions_to_main_agent.animations_and_interactions: In CSS, add 'html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }'. Add simple CSS transitions for hover states on buttons and cards (.3s ease).
instructions_to_main_agent.accessibility_and_testing: Ensure high color contrast ratios. ALL interactive elements (buttons, nav links, form inputs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='home-nav-link').
